root.message: 👋 Welcome to Sri Aurobindo College (Morning), University of Delhi! I'm AuroBot, your virtual assistant. How can I help you today?

admissions.message: 📋 Welcome to Admissions! What would you like to know about?

admissions_2025.message: 🎓 Admissions 2025–26 at Sri Aurobindo College are processed via the University of Delhi's centralised CSAS portal. Key resources:
admissions_2025.response: Admissions follow the DU CSAS (Common Seat Allocation System) process. Please check the Prospectus and Latest Updates for this year's cutoffs, seat matrix, and schedules.

course_seats.message: 🪑 Course-wise seat availability for Sri Aurobindo College:
course_seats.response: Please visit the official seat matrix page for exact seat counts per category (General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, PwD).

fee_structure.message: 💰 Fee Structure for Sri Aurobindo College:
fee_structure.response: Fee details vary by course and category. The official fee structure page has programme-wise breakdowns. Fee payment is done via the ICICI EazyPay portal.

special_quota.message: 🏆 Special Quota Admissions – choose a category:

eca_admission.response: ECA admissions are open for students with achievements in areas like music, dance, theatre, fine arts, debate, etc. Trials and document verification are conducted by the college.

sports_quota.response: Sports quota seats are reserved for students with outstanding sports achievements at state or national level. Physical trials are held by the college.

ward_quota.response: Ward quota is available for children of University of Delhi employees. Specific documents and processes apply.

admission_grievance.response: For any admission-related issues, you can reach the Grievance Committee or Admission Help Desk.

academics.message: 📚 What academic information are you looking for?

departments.message: 🏫 Sri Aurobindo College has departments across two streams:

science_depts.message: 🔭 Science Departments at Sri Aurobindo College:

arts_commerce_depts.message: 📊 Commerce & Humanities Departments at Sri Aurobindo College:

courses.message: 📖 Courses offered at Sri Aurobindo College:

undergraduate_programmes: Sciences – B.Sc. (H) Electronics, B.Sc. Life Science, B.Sc. Physical Science
Humanities – B.A. (H) English, B.A. (H) Hindi, B.A. (H) Political Science, B.A. Programme (Multi-disciplinary), M.A. Hindi

nep_structure.response: Sri Aurobindo College follows the UGCF 2022 framework under NEP. The 4-year programme includes multiple exit options and a research component in the 4th year.

academic_calendar.response: The academic calendar lists important dates for the academic year including the start/end of semesters, examination schedules, and holidays.

time_table.response: Department-wise and semester-wise timetables are published on the college website.

elective_ge.response: GE papers allow students to study subjects outside their core discipline, broadening their academic exposure.

elective_sec.response: SEC papers are designed to provide vocational and practical skills to students.

elective_vac.response: VAC papers focus on ethical, environmental, and societal values.

elective_aec.response: AEC papers help students develop language and communication abilities. Offered in English and Hindi.

exam_general.response: This section covers attendance requirements, eligibility, examination norms, and DU examination guidelines.

exam_internal.response: Internal assessment (IA) contributes to the final grade. Details about IA marks, tutorials, and practical components are listed here.

exam_du.response: For official DU exam forms, results, and notifications visit the DU Examination portal.

exam_upc.message: 🔢 Unique Paper Codes (UPC) of Elective Papers:
exam_upc.response: Students need UPCs when filling examination forms for elective courses.

about.message: 🏛️ About Sri Aurobindo College – what would you like to know?

about_college.response: Sri Aurobindo College is a premier institution of the University of Delhi, located in South Delhi. Accredited with NAAC Grade B+, it is named after the great philosopher-yogi Sri Aurobindo. The college imparts education blending Indian culture with modern academic practices. The Principal is Prof. Arun Chaudhary.

vision_mission.message: 🎯 Vision & Mission of Sri Aurobindo College:
vision_mission.response: The college is inspired by the philosophy of Sri Aurobindo and aims at holistic development – academic excellence, character building, intellectual curiosity, creativity, and ethical values.

principal.response: Prof. Arun Chaudhary is the Principal of Sri Aurobindo College (Morning). He leads the college with a focus on holistic education, research, and student welfare.

annual_reports.message: 📄 Annual Reports of Sri Aurobindo College:

virtual_tour.message: 🏫 Take a Virtual Tour of Sri Aurobindo College campus:

infrastructure.message: 🏗️ Infrastructure & Facilities – what are you looking for?

library.response: The library provides access to a wide range of books, journals, and digital resources. Faculty can access One Nation One Subscription (ONOS) e-resources.

laboratories.response: The college has well-equipped science laboratories for Physics, Chemistry, Electronics, Computer Science, Botany, Zoology, and more.

campus.response: Sri Aurobindo College's campus is located at Shivalik, Malviya Nagar – a serene and accessible location near Malviya Nagar Metro Station.

facility_medical.response: The college has a medical room with a part-time allopathic doctor and nurse for student health needs.

safety.response: The college maintains strict security norms. Unauthorized entry into college premises is prohibited.

students_corner.message: 👨‍🎓 Student's Corner – what do you need help with?

placement.response: Sri Aurobindo College has a dedicated Placement Cell. Top recruiters include Accenture, HDFC Bank, Asian Paints, Havells, Hero, and many more.

scholarships.message: 🏅 Scholarships available at Sri Aurobindo College:
scholarships.response: The college offers the Student Aid Fund Scholarship for meritorious and financially needy students. Various government and DU scholarships are also facilitated.

icc.response: The ICC handles complaints related to sexual harassment in the workplace/campus as per the POSH Act 2013.

anti_ragging.response: Ragging is strictly prohibited at Sri Aurobindo College and University of Delhi. Report ragging immediately.

internal_assessment.response: Students can view their internal assessment / tutorial marks via the ERP portal. Improvement of marks can be requested within the stipulated deadline.

career_counseling.response: The college offers career guidance sessions, mentorship programmes, and connects students with industry professionals.

enquiry_desk.response: For any college-related queries, please visit or contact the Enquiry Desk.

alumni.response: Our distinguished alumni include politicians, civil servants, defence officers, academics, and business leaders. Notable alumni: Virendra Sachdeva, Manisha Saxena, Neeraj Pandey, and many more.

extra_curricular.message: 🎭 Extra Curricular Activities at Sri Aurobindo College:

student_union.response: The Student Union of Sri Aurobindo College represents students' interests and organises various events and activities throughout the year.

student_societies.response: The college has a rich ecosystem of student societies covering academics, arts, culture, and more.

ncc.response: NCC at Sri Aurobindo College trains students in discipline, leadership, and national service. It is open to interested students subject to selection.

nss.response: NSS at Sri Aurobindo College engages students in community service, social activities, and camps. NSS students have participated in Republic Day Parade camps.

details.notable_achievement: NSS Vice President Rishu Raj selected for North Zone Pre-Republic Day Parade Camp.

sports.response: Our students have excelled in sports at national and international levels – including gold medals in Archery, Shooting, Trampoline, and top ranks in UPSC CDS.

recent_achievements: Ayush Rao – Gold Medal, All India University Games 2024-25 & National Gold in Archery
Sumedha Sharma – Gold & Bronze at 67th National Shooting Championship
Manish Singh Rawat – Gold at Senior National Trampoline Championship
Manvi Rawat – Bronze at Senior Taekwondo Nationals & Gold at Cadet Champion of Champions 2025

spic_macay.message: 🎵 SPIC MACAY (Society for the Promotion of Indian Classical Music And Culture Amongst Youth):

research.message: 🔬 Research & Innovation at Sri Aurobindo College:

conferences.response: Sri Aurobindo College regularly organises national and international conferences. Recent example: International Conference on 'Empowering Rural Communities – Agrarian Politics and the Legacy of Chaudhary Charan Singh towards Viksit Bharat'.

administration.message: 🏛️ Administration – what would you like to know?

rti.response: RTI applications can be submitted as per the RTI Act 2005 to the Public Information Officer of the college.

faq.question: What is the NAAC grade of Sri Aurobindo College?
faq.answer: Sri Aurobindo College (Morning) has been accredited with NAAC Grade B+.

faq.question: Who is the Principal of Sri Aurobindo College?
faq.answer: Prof. Arun Chaudhary is the current Principal of Sri Aurobindo College (Morning).

faq.question: Where is Sri Aurobindo College located?
faq.answer: Sri Aurobindo College is located at Shivalik, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi – 110017. The nearest metro station is Malviya Nagar Metro Station.

faq.question: What is the contact number of Sri Aurobindo College?
What is the email of the Principal?
How can I apply for admission?
faq.answer: Admissions at Sri Aurobindo College are processed through the University of Delhi CSAS portal. Visit https://www.aurobindo.du.ac.in/latest-updates for the latest admission information.

faq.question: Does the college offer B.Com (Hons)?
faq.answer: Yes, Sri Aurobindo College offers B.Com (Hons) and B.Com (Programme).

faq.question: How do I pay fees?
faq.answer: Fees can be paid online through the ICICI EazyPay portal: https://eazypay.icicibank.com/

faq.question: What is the ERP / student portal?
faq.answer: The ERP portal is Saksham: https://saksham.sac.sitslive.com/

faq.question: Does the college have NCC and NSS?
faq.answer: Yes, Sri Aurobindo College has both NCC (National Cadet Corps) and NSS (National Service Scheme) units.

faq.question: Who are the top recruiters at Sri Aurobindo College?
faq.answer: Top recruiters include Accenture, HDFC Bank, Asian Paints, Havells, Hero, HCC, Cloud Analogy, and others.

faq.question: What is the anti-ragging helpline?
faq.answer: The UGC Anti-Ragging helpline number is 1800-180-5522. Visit https://www.aurobindo.du.ac.in/anti-ragging for more details.
